description: Attaches a popup text annotation to a shape or expression, displayed on user interaction. Content is in PLAIN TEXT mode by default — text renders as-is. Math expressions must be wrapped in math() to render as math. Supports custom text and background colors.
utility: Attach popup text notes or media to shapes and expressions (plain text default, use math() for math)

arguments.name: content
arguments.description: Text content or media asset name in quotes

arguments.name: color
arguments.description: Text color for the note - e.g., c(black), c(red)

arguments.name: fillColor
arguments.description: Background fill color - e.g., fc(orange), fc(yellow)

alternates.variant: Simple text note on a point
alternates.description: Attach a text annotation to a point

alternates.syntax: point(G, x, y, notes("text", c(black), fc(orange)))
alternates.description: Note with text color and background color
Show note when text is revealed

alternates.syntax: point(G, x, y, notes("You can write a long sentence here"))

examples.scenario: Standalone notes with timing, color and styled background (diameter through center lesson)
examples.expression: notes_1=notes("First we need to find the center of the circle",0.54,c(black),fc(pink),fs(24),ff("Gill Sans"),stay(0.5))

examples.scenario: Notes on a paragraph for slide navigation context (axis intercepts lesson)
examples.expression: paragraph_1=paragraph(at(5,6),44.1,4.4,para_str_3,ff("Gill Sans"),effect(slideup),notes("Circle on a Line's Axis Intercepts"))

examples.scenario: Notes on a circle for teaching context (circle from diameter lesson)
examples.expression: circle_1 = circle(graph_1, point_1, point_2, type(diameter), c(mediumvioletred),notes("the diameter defines the circle completely"))

examples.scenario: Notes on a write expression for general equation result (circle from diameter lesson)
Notes on a write result indicating point position (Point and Circle lesson)
examples.expression: write_6=write(at(39,8),"=−11",notes("negative — the point is inside the circle"))
